expectations.text: Email has a clear subject line about project status
expectations.evidence: Subject: Website Redesign Update - Week 3 of 6

expectations.text: Progress is quantified (3 of 6 weeks, or ~50%)
Completed work (wireframes) and next phase (visual design) are clearly stated
expectations.evidence: 'Completed the wireframes phase' and 'Visual design phase kicks off next week'

expectations.text: The API integration risk is flagged with its potential impact (extra week)
expectations.evidence: 'API integration work may require an additional week' with detail about shifting from 6 to 7 weeks

expectations.text: Output is plain text without markdown formatting (per email drafting rules)
expectations.evidence: No bold, asterisks, or markdown formatting. Uses plain text with dashes for lists.
